name: MSI X870E GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C (DP1.4 Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870EGPW)
shortName: MSI X870E GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: High-end ATX gaming motherboard with AM5 socket and DDR5 support, featuring Wi-Fi 7 and PCIe 5.0.
